subject: Images always deselected
body:
Dear all,

I desperately try to start to analyze my tomography cryo-EM data with Warp 
collected a few months ago on a Krios in Heidelberg.
When I go through the first step, i.e I want to import my data, I 
correctely enter the path of my files (I am able to see the right number of 
files to import, through the wheel of the « Processing Status »). But 
unfortunately, all files deselect by themselves!!

We noticed that in all  .xml files generated, the answer to UnselectManual 
is TRUE. If we change this answer to FALSE , the file is selected and can 
be processed. 7,171 files have to be processed so how can we fix this 
problem for all the 7,171 files and why it is so? Do I need to 
« pre-process » my data before by changing/modifying any subtil parameters?
